text:
NTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
DRAGON HEAD+
SATURN+MARS .. Power indicating career of audacity
pertaining to wheels-a rough-and-
touch type-native who gains power
through society subsequently
becomes a social-evil.
NOTE: Here, if there is interchange or seventh aspect of Jupiter
then the native becomes an Engineer pertaining to machineries-
pertaining to vehicles.
DRAGON HEAD+
SATURN+ MERCURY Quite intelligent but audacity
prevails. One who can build castles
in the air. mansion in speech, enjoys
wealth through such means-quite a
talkative one. bringing disrespect on
his self, career pertaining to riturals
(APARA KARMA) - can do
business in tubes and pipes including
plastic articles-during career will
have opposite sex relations and
enjoys profit, business of tannery is
also profitable.
DRAGON HEAD+
SATURN+JUPITER A guide in a Big institution/concem-
audocious-medical-man(a llopathy).
DRAGON HEAD+
SATURN+VENUS Career pertaining to large scale
buildings/mansions/bungalows
